[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1010011 4
1 1101111 6
2 1000101 3
3 1110101 5
4 1100010 3
5 1010011 4
6 1101111 6
7 1001101 4

01 10 0100110 3
12 21 0100110 3
23 32 1011011 5
34 43 0111100 4
45 54 0100010 2
56 65 0010110 3
67 76 0110001 3
70 07 1100010 3 match 4

02 20 0000000 a
13 31 1111101 6
24 42 1100111 5
35 53 0011110 4
46 64 0110100 3
57 75 0100111 4
60 06 1010011 4 match 0 5
71 17 1000100 2

14 41 1000001 2

36 63 0001000 1
47 74 0000101 2
50 05 1000101 3 match 2
61 16 1110101 5 match 3
72 27 1100010 3 match 4

15 51 1100011 4
26 62 1010011 4 match 0 5
37 73 0111001 4
